message:
feat(abi): port 10 glibc reserved-namespace aliases across process/io/unistd/time (bd-4l5om)

Adds the remaining glibc reserved-namespace aliases for the
already-shipped public functions in process_abi, io_abi,
unistd_abi, and time_abi:

- process_abi: __wait3, __wait4, __waitid
- io_abi: __dup3, __pipe2
- unistd_abi: __getcwd, __getlogin, __getlogin_r
- time_abi: __clock_settime, __clock_nanosleep

glibc emits these as both internal-use entry points and as the
symbols libstdc++, NSS modules, libdl, and libpthread internals
link against. Without them callers see undefined-reference
errors when linking such code statically.

Implementation: thin no_mangle Rust extern "C" wrappers
delegating to the public counterparts — same pattern as the
previously-shipped __pthread_*, __libc_dlopen_mode, __strchrnul/
__memrchr/__getline alias families.

Tests: 10 abi integration tests across the four test files,
covering: __pipe2/__dup3 round-trip; __wait3/__wait4/__waitid
collect a forked child; __getcwd matches getcwd output;
__getlogin / __getlogin_r match the public counterparts (or
agree on EINVAL); __clock_nanosleep with a zero-time request
returns 0; __clock_settime on CLOCK_MONOTONIC fails (-1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -456,6 +456,50 @@ pub unsafe extern "C" fn waitid(
     }
 }
 
+/// glibc reserved-namespace alias for [`wait3`].
+///
+/// # Safety
+///
+/// Same as [`wait3`].
+#[cfg_attr(not(debug_assertions), unsafe(no_mangle))]
+pub unsafe extern "C" fn __wait3(
+    wstatus: *mut c_int,
+    options: c_int,
+    rusage: *mut libc::rusage,
+) -> libc::pid_t {
+    unsafe { wait3(wstatus, options, rusage) }
+}
+
+/// glibc reserved-namespace alias for [`wait4`].
+///
+/// # Safety
+///
+/// Same as [`wait4`].
+#[cfg_attr(not(debug_assertions), unsafe(no_mangle))]
+pub unsafe extern "C" fn __wait4(
+    pid: libc::pid_t,
+    wstatus: *mut c_int,
+    options: c_int,
+    rusage: *mut libc::rusage,
+) -> libc::pid_t {
+    unsafe { wait4(pid, wstatus, options, rusage) }
+}
+
+/// glibc reserved-namespace alias for [`waitid`].
+///
+/// # Safety
+///
+/// Same as [`waitid`].
+#[cfg_attr(not(debug_assertions), unsafe(no_mangle))]
+pub unsafe extern "C" fn __waitid(
+    idtype: c_int,
+    id: libc::id_t,
+    infop: *mut libc::siginfo_t,
+    options: c_int,
+) -> c_int {
+    unsafe { waitid(idtype, id, infop, options) }
+}
+
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 // vfork
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
